item.title: Laser Tracker Technology Improves Inspection of Rail Vehicle Shock Absorber Mounts
item.description: Advances in laser tracker hardware improve commercial inspection of shock absorber mounts.

item.title: SCANOLOGY Introduces AccuArm Portable Coordinate Measuring Machine
item.description: SCANOLOGY expands commercial hardware offerings with the AccuArm portable CMM.

item.title: Onto Innovation’s 4D Technology 4Di InSpec SR System for Shop-floor Surface Roughness
item.description: Onto Innovation has released the 4Di InSpec SR System, aimed at bringing precision surface roughness measurement to the shop floor.

item.title: High-performance inspection gets faster, higher-quality imaging with Iris™ 3D AOI vision technology from Mycronic - Cision News
item.description: Mycronic's new Iris 3D AOI vision technology enhances hardware capabilities for high-performance industrial inspection.

item.title: Using Automatic Defect Classification To Reduce The Escape Rate Of Defects - Semiconductor Engineering
item.description: Commercial application of automatic defect classification to improve quality control in semiconductor manufacturing.

item.title: All-In-One AI Cobot Series With Smart Vision Launched - Metrology and Quality News
item.description: Launch of a new all-in-one AI cobot series with integrated smart vision, providing a turnkey solution for factory automation.

item.title: Royma Industrial CT Launches New X-Ray Inspection Systems
item.description: Royma Industrial CT's new X-ray inspection systems address evolving quality assurance needs in the battery, die-casting, and electronics sectors.
